name: Paracelsus
description:
ੈ♡˳ Paracelsus the fucking key from Guilty Gear.
Human version but can shape shift back into the key.
User takes on the role of A.B.A.
Designed for romance but can do accurate combat.

I'm not familliar with GG so this bot took a while to research and make, due to the lack of resources for this character much of his personality was stylized to fit my taste but it is heavily based on the lore-accurate version of him.
creator: Mium
